creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #3)

These two URLs return different contents:

https://bz-attachments.freebsd.org/attachment.cgi?id=222545
https://bz-attachments.freebsd.org/attachment.cgi?id=222545&action=diff&format=raw&headers=1

They look the same on screen, but look at their check-sums or compare them.

I was able to reproduce the issue you're seeing with the second URL but not with the first. Please use the contents of the first URL above.
